original text: This summer three courses are requiring summer assignments. Please click on the classes below to be directed to the summer assignments. If you have any questions regarding the assignment, please contact the instructor listed on the assignment or Mr. Jim Ryan, Social Studies Department Chair at jryan@montini.org.
